jd_analysis_result.summary: Hardi Aged Care is seeking AINs to provide personal care and clinical support to elderly residents. The role involves delivering best practice care while ensuring the health and wellbeing of residents.

skill_evidence.aged care: you love working with older people and understand how important the job of an AIN really is
skill_evidence.organisation: Excellent organisation and time management skills
skill_evidence.clinical skills: proven clinical skills in assessments, observations, wound and continence management
skill_evidence.computer skills: a candidate with writing skills and computer skills
skill_evidence.risk management: promote personal safety and risk management
skill_evidence.time management: Excellent organisation and time management skills
skill_evidence.effective communication: Effective communication skills, both written and verbal

responsibilities: Assist with delivering best practice clinical care and support that enhances the health and wellbeing of our residents.
Provide a wide range of personal care services.
Have proven clinical skills in assessments, observations, wound and continence management.
Practice a duty of care, and promote personal safety and risk management.
Adhere to policies and procedures regarding resident charting and documentation.
